title: Agent manifest
description: manifest.yaml inside an agent folder. SPEC §4. M1 fields (secrets, concurrency, timeout, network, allowSelfTrigger) are declared now so the disk contract does not churn; M0 validates them but only partially acts on them.

name.description: Agent identity; must match expectations for container/image naming.

on.description: Subscriptions: which signals this agent fires on.

filter.description: Declarative JSONPath filter: '<jsonpath> <op> <json-literal>' with op == or !=. SPEC §3.

payloadSchema.description: Path, relative to the agent folder, of the JSON Schema this agent requires the payload to satisfy. Omitted = accepts any payload; no boot-time compatibility check for this subscription.

secrets.description: Secret NAMES only; resolved at spawn via SecretsProvider. SPEC §8. (Enforced in M1.)

concurrency.description: Per-agent cap on simultaneous runs. (Enforced in M1.)

timeout.description: Seconds before a framework-enforced kill; explicit null opts into an indefinite run. (Enforced in M1.)

allowSelfTrigger.description: Whether this agent's own emissions may re-trigger it. SPEC §7. (Enforced in M1.)

image.description: Prebuilt image reference (bring-your-own-image). Mutually exclusive with a Dockerfile in the folder; that exclusivity is checked by the loader, not this schema.
